misconfig_patterns: Embedded mode: no listener — exposure is object-storage ACL (S3/GCS/Azure), not a port
lanced server mode: no auth in default config
S3-backed deployments: ACL misconfiguration exposes raw Lance files

active_probe.false_positive_check: response must be JSON array of table names — LanceDB server has no distinct header marker

deployment_tells: Embedded mode: no network listener — only observable via object storage access logs
Server mode: GET /v1/table/ returns table list without auth
Lance file format detectable in S3 buckets by .lance extension
pivot_paths: GET /v1/table/ → table list without auth (server mode)
S3/GCS object listing → .lance files → direct file access
